heading: Acceptance of promotion; oath of office
label: 14309 Acceptance of promotion; oath of office
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3394 and 8394 of this title, prior to repeal by , (c)(1).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(1)
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.heading: .—Acceptance
children.label: a .—Acceptance
children.text: An officer who is appointed to a higher grade under this chapter shall be considered to have accepted the appointment on the date on which the appointment is made unless the officer expressly declines the appointment or is granted a delay of promotion under .section 14312 of this title

children.heading: .—Oath
children.label: b .—Oath
children.text: An officer who has served continuously since taking the oath of office prescribed in is not required to take a new oath upon appointment to a higher grade under this chapter.section 3331 of title 5
